segments.text: Today, we have come here to do the Adi Shakti project.
I've already told you about
The Adishakti how she had
To work out so many things in this world
First was create and then
Create human beings through evolutionary process
After that
To comfort them
Then to console them
So many people came on this earth just to do the counselling.
They told what was wrong,
What is right?
What should we be doing or not doing
and what self-respect
And
The duty of a human being
as superior most creature
Many of them came
One after another, in every country they came and their counselling formed religions.
Of course you see the mess of the religions
And that's how there life was wasted
That they found religions after religions by which only human beings were divided
Divided to such an extent
they hate each other. If somebody is born in an ex-religion, he hates the person who follows
the vile religion – why those came as counsellors talked about complete unity?
Complete oneness of human race despite that human brain and its freedom did all kinds
wrong things and created a country or you can say the whole world full of lots
of problems arising out of religion. How can it be that religion makes you hate somebody?
Religion is there to understand love, to imbibe Love and compassion so the third thing one
had to do is the Adi Shaktis job. That's the one Kundalini within us and by Her awakening
we got pure knowledge, absolute knowledge that it cannot be challenged absolutely whatever
you know after realization its absolute if You now then what We have to understand
that everything has to be united.
You cannot have fights and you can not hate anyone
if the thing starts happening,
all problems of world will finished
so first reduction
that is quality of Adi Shakti
was redeem people
of their all-wrong ideas about others. Firstly, as we know there are six enemies we have got
and unless or until you can conquer those 6 enemies
We cannot be a religious person that's what it is said
but actually the all religions are based only on
prospering those 6 enemies that they're within us
When you see this clearly, you start seeking. You start seeking, seeking
earnest the truth and that revelation of truth
Absolute Truth can only come through your evolution
Through Your reformation
That you become
person who knows
For that, Adi Shaktis ascent is important within you which your Kundalini and when this
thing takes place automatically drop all those six enemies.
You become a beautiful human being like lotus in the very germinating state it looks
Like all other small animals or you can say very, very dirty things that are in the pond.
And then when it starts coming out of this horrible water – it becomes such a beautiful
rises up and opens out in the same way a Sahaja Yogi though lives along with all these horrible
things that are going on, but flowers like a lotus.
It doesn't have all this insects or is dirt and filth of water which it leaves
It sucks only the pure water and others remain there as it is.
So what's left within you, nothing but purity beauty and fragrance just like a lotus then
And there is no more the problem of getting attacked by all these small, small creatures
in water or all those dirty things that are on the water.
This state you have achieved now I am very happy to see so many people in America have
You see, it's a very great blessing because America is the leading country in so many
ways.
One can say that It has made lots of money – That Is not The Criteria or becoming
A Very Good Sahaja Yoga!
What you get either satisfaction…satisfaction that you enjoy whatever you have and what
And the second thing that happens to you, you become absolutely collective.
This has happened but I find still people have not understood
The meaning of collectivity
For example family is very weak here
Family that's been created by natural relationships
is not so much respected as it should have.
It's all because based on money,
some people start quarrelling fighting even killing each other
Now the basis of family Islam and compassion
those who do no this cannot good families
I've seen among Sahaja Yogis sometime
Some people who are working for money,
Who are educated.
Sometimes look down upon
People
Who aren't so well off
Or may be the housewives
Who're working in their houses
Looking after children
Building up families
Are not treated with respect
As some secret healer
some organization. I don't know why this kind of a manliness comes into women? Why
should they think that something higher than the woman who are working hard in
household cooking, looking after children wearing all the brunt
This is something, I feel it's a part which is lacking very much in America and also western
countries.
When money becomes important – if when the money is important then the Lakshmi principle
very surprising, money is the part or we should say blessing of the lakshmi but the grahalakshmi
–the one who's a householder-is not respected. And with this I tell you there are some
and look after their unity, instead of that educated women I call them manly woman.
Educated Women think they are something higher than satanistic people
in no way a Man is Higher Than A Woman
so this kind of disparity that exists
And one starts thinking we're earning
We Are Educating
or really manly women i must say
But the women who work very hard in a household with love, look after their children.
Look after family are is no way less than these people working at offices so such
woman must be respected by her husband or male of his family not only that but all
Sahaja Yogis must respect such women who are doing
Such a difficult task.
I've been housewife and i know what it is
to run the house,to look after children
To
Look After complete organization
And
Looking after the expenditure
of money if that's limited
This ego has go over
The other day one lady, she came as an interviewer and asked Me that how is it in this world
of men you are so much respected. World Of Men? I was really laughing! Who makes them
think there's the word of man –I can't understand-can they exist without women?
But I was amazed at her question because she said that even in the jail criminals have so
much respect for you.
How is it possible?
how can they be so much respected by a woman, if i cant understand one thing that criminals
have got mothers or not? All males don't they have a mother. They all
and respect the Mother, that's point one should know
That woman is much more important thing
than man as far as children are concerned
But I've seen even some ladies
who think their very capable try to control
and create problems, and mother's job is not to control.
Her job it love –to give compassion
And this the quality of women is lost
in these western so called advanced countries
It a very dangerous thing I personally think
that if such things happens
families will be destroyed
nobody would have respect
for the lady who looks after family and she is more than a prime minister, I would say
in her family. And She's to be respected
Today i think it important
To Say that all of you should understand
The value
Of women
Who are housewives
It´s tremendous job
to be a housewife, I have gone through it and I know what that is.
The respect for the housewives if not given
she won't also look after her children
Children are tomorrow's citizens
who will groom them
Who'll bring then up
All these manly women don´t always have children sometimes
so they do'nt know about problem of their child
At least those solving problems
you must understand their responsibility
This is a very, very crucial point I think on which all the western societies are collapsing
because in their culture there's no place for them at home.
So women should not feel any way less if they're mothers and looking after household
They shouldn't be inferior to anybody who thinks that
Basically the families have to be improved.
This collectivity must work first in a family, that children are to be groomed properly they
had been brought up with proper way as it is this day you know what's happening
when I read about and am really shocked that children are just treated as if there
unwanted stuff. They are not given any attention, ultimately the children become drug addicts
they became vagabonds or anything!
Because there is so much neglect and hatred for children
So one has to first remember that for collectivity you must look after your children
Not only that with love and compassion,
not as somebody who is trying to become a despot out of it
but
A person
Who Is the source
With The Source Of Joy And Compassion.
In one my lectures I talk
To you about
The emotional intelligence
That's what we should try to invite
emotional intelligence. That means the intelligence that is based on emotions, unless and until
we become emotionally intelligent our society cannot do it because an emotional intelligence
you care or enjoy caring ,you do everything for others with a great emotional understanding
Not for one child, not for once son but everyone you have to be emotionally intelligent.
Some children are born like this and some are made that way so they should also be
emotionally intelligent because if the mother or father is money oriented very selfish
They won't allow their child to give anything to others, so such a child will grow into
very funny type of person and he'll never do for anybody not even his own country.
Why should it be?
Everything is selfishness then people indulge in corruption, indulging all kinds things
which are only selfish in attitude.
Now we're talking of collectivity,
in-collectivty
you do for others
We enjoy being for other
You love giving things to others
not for our yourself
because your children will also become the same kind
and they'll be bothered about themselves
This emotional intelligence
has been brought into life
In our pattern that we have, are We emotionally intelligent or Are Just Intelligent or Emotionally?
Both things are wrong.
If You're just intelligent you can become very dry person
and may be friends maybe but not have
And will always try to preserve yourself away from the collectivity
And if you are emotional, you'll be attached only to one person – attached
to a child maybe.
Attached with just 1% to someone even in the society for no rhyme and reason why?
Why were you attached to that person or bothered about this other person ? Only
all such people fall into such terrible pain . In the politics we have seen how
People try to help their own sons and our daughters,
this or that. And we Indians have suffered a lot with these
kind of an emotional attachment
So according to ethics
Emotional intelligence is the highest quality
by which you give for others
You care for other's
For everyone
and you become very, very collected.
Now exclusiveness is another fashion
that's very much there – it´s exclusive
because we don't want to be one of the multitudes
but to be exclusive
We should be exclusive in emotional intensity
not on other things
That' sthe best thing
You can have
As I agree
am just a woman
Am Just A Mother

I know about everything,
and understand a lot of it.
And all this work has been done
because that quality in my head
–I am not attached to one person or two
once time whatever you say
i can't understand
Because I'm at the level
where we can understand
every thing that level
To achieve that
You try to develop emotional intelligence.
Here the children won't even give a toy
for somebody, to play with it!

And we must have our own
you say everything should be of one's own

specially because they are

Joy of Life is only in

If you don't have that, it becomes very dry
life become very hard, unbearable, horrible
and even family gets broken up
if there is no emotional intelligence in a family
I've known so many women

but they can do it
But now because of this lack
It is something that has a sense of giving, it's not that you are sacrificing anything

You understand that if really love something then
